comments.body:
Currently this is blowing up.  Not sure why

Symlink shenanigans don't mix well with new-style vendoring.  If you can't avoid having symlinks in the elements of $GOPATH, replacing `ln -s vendor src` with `mv vendor src` will basically turn the current setup into old-style vendoring.
Ok this spec file can now build an installable package.
I think we can consider merging this now and then start the Fedora Review Process.
I think some of the Requires are wrong also.  Since these are cut and paste from cri-o.
Moved buildah to 0.0.1 and fixed the cut and paste error.
@nalind fixed last comment, which I missed the first time,  Sorry.
LGTM.  For my future reference, are we expecting to synchronize this with the version of the .spec file in [the Fedora package](http://pkgs.fedoraproject.org/cgit/rpms/buildah.git/tree/buildah.spec)?

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/126b578d8e6b4b81875c842c7486440582ec013d.1494265824312355072/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing 126b578d8e6b4b81875c842c7486440582ec013d to master...
